entries.title: Google ads mcp
entries.rationale: Retain the user need for account access, but v2 must use a capability-led connector contract rather than assume one MCP implementation.

entries.title: Negative Keywords Research Needed
entries.rationale: Keep negative-keyword research in the Google contract and verify it through source-grounded applicability tests.

entries.title: Feature Request: Apple Search Ads (ASA) Support
entries.rationale: Apple has a dedicated skill; v2 still requires fixtures, evidence, and contract tests before verified capability status.

entries.title: feat: add marketplace.json for plugin system updates
entries.rationale: Marketplace metadata exists; keep it in the portability and packaging matrix.

entries.title: meta-audit.md: Andromeda April 2026 shift — full automation layer, not just retrieval engine
entries.rationale: Re-research current official Meta behavior, model it as expiring claims, and add regression coverage instead of copying issue prose.

entries.title: [Bug]: Plugin marketplace add fails with mixed-case names due to case normalization
entries.rationale: Normalize identifiers and test case-sensitive and case-insensitive filesystems.

entries.title: NLPM audit: 2 security findings in install.sh (Medium severity)
entries.rationale: Eliminate curl-to-shell guidance and silent break-system-packages fallback through a redesigned installer and tests.

entries.title: [Bug]: How can I contact you
entries.rationale: Enable and document a private vulnerability-reporting route; community links are not a substitute for security intake.

entries.title: Security: Potential path traversal in batch mode output_dir (generate_image.py)
entries.rationale: Centralize safe-root containment and cover traversal, prefix confusion, symlinks, and race conditions.

entries.title: Security: Supply chain risk — curl-to-bash install without integrity verification
entries.rationale: Prefer native plugin installs or verified release archives with checksums and provenance.

entries.title: Security: .gitignore missing critical patterns (defense in depth)
entries.rationale: Expand ignores and add scanning; ignore patterns alone are not a release control.

entries.title: SSRF bypass in claude-ads
entries.rationale: Treat the parser differential as one regression in a broader network/browser SSRF threat model.

entries.title: [Bug] install.sh configures broken MCP: mcp-google-ads uses sunset API v19
entries.rationale: Remove unconditional broken integration setup and require current capability/version discovery.

entries.title: [Bug]: Smart Conversions can't be removed
entries.rationale: Controls must emit only currently actionable recommendations and otherwise explain the platform constraint.

entries.title: [Bug]: Not valid zip file
entries.rationale: Build release archives from an allowlist and test upload/extraction portability before publication.

entries.title: [Bug]: Install doensnt work
entries.rationale: Public instructions must never point unauthenticated users at a private raw URL.

entries.title: [Feature]: Meta ads should account for meta account cold starts
entries.rationale: Add explicit account, pixel, and conversion-history intake with cold-start-specific planning and confidence labels.

entries.title: install.sh hardcodes REPO_URL to a private org repo (404) instead of the public AgriciDaniel/claude-ads
entries.rationale: Separate private development remotes from public release metadata and test anonymous installation.

entries.title: Fix: PowerShell 5.1 installer/uninstaller broken by stderr handling and Unicode characters
entries.rationale: Retain the failure cases in a redesigned Windows installer matrix; do not merge the stale conflicting patch.

entries.title: EveryThingAi Claude AI Ads
entries.rationale: A third-party white-label rename is outside product scope and changes ownership metadata.

entries.title: Add files via upload
entries.rationale: The change mixes client campaign data, binary assets, unrelated skills, and conflicting infrastructure; client artifacts must not enter the product repository.

entries.title: Opened by mistake
entries.rationale: The author marked it mistaken and the requirements document is not an accepted product contract.

entries.title: chore(deps): Bump actions/setup-python from 5 to 6
entries.rationale: Merged baseline dependency update; future changes follow the v2 dependency gate.

entries.title: chore(deps): Bump actions/checkout from 4 to 6
entries.rationale: Merged baseline dependency update; future changes follow the v2 dependency gate.

entries.title: chore(deps): Update pillow requirement from <12.0.0,>=11.0.0 to >=11.0.0,<13.0.0
entries.rationale: Merged baseline dependency update; future changes follow the v2 dependency gate.

entries.title: feat: improve skill scores for claude-ads
entries.rationale: Use observable validation checkpoints and compact progressive disclosure, but validate independently rather than optimize for one vendor score.

entries.title: feat: scaffold internal audit tool with FastAPI + Google Ads connector
entries.rationale: A web application and database are outside the lean skill/CLI v2 product boundary.

entries.title: chore(deps): Bump dependabot/fetch-metadata from 2.5.0 to 3.0.0
entries.rationale: Superseded by a newer dependency proposal.

entries.title: docs: use lowercase marketplace name to fix macOS case-sensitive rename bug
entries.rationale: Normalize names across all manifests and test both filesystem semantics instead of applying a one-line stale patch.

entries.title: fix: remove --break-system-packages silent fallback in install.sh
entries.rationale: The requirement is mandatory; implement it within the managed v2 environment and installer redesign.

entries.title: fix: replace curl-pipe-sh guidance with plugin install command in install.sh
entries.rationale: Prefer native plugin or verified archive installation throughout docs and scripts, not only one output line.

entries.title: chore(deps): Bump dependabot/fetch-metadata from 2.5.0 to 3.1.0
entries.rationale: Review after the v2 dependency model is fixed and merge only if the full matrix passes.

entries.title: chore(deps): Update reportlab requirement from <5.0.0,>=4.0 to >=4.4.10,<5.0.0
entries.rationale: Review with renderer compatibility and reproducible packaging tests after dependency redesign.

entries.title: chore(deps): Update requests requirement from <3.0.0,>=2.32.4 to >=2.33.1,<3.0.0
entries.rationale: A newer requests proposal exists; evaluate only the newest compatible version.

entries.title: chore(deps): Update matplotlib requirement from <4.0.0,>=3.8.0 to >=3.10.9,<4.0.0
entries.rationale: Review only if matplotlib remains in the lean v2 dependency model.

entries.title: chore(deps): Update playwright requirement from <2.0.0,>=1.56.0 to >=1.58.0,<2.0.0
entries.rationale: Review with the browser security and installation matrix after dependency redesign.

entries.title: chore(deps): Update pillow requirement from <13.0.0,>=11.0.0 to >=12.2.0,<13.0.0
entries.rationale: Review with image-generation fixtures and packaging tests after dependency redesign.

entries.title: Add: CodeQL, Pre-commit, DevContainer, SBOM (Fork Doctor 13/13)
entries.rationale: Adopt focused CodeQL and SBOM/release evidence where useful; reject unrelated development-environment expansion and score chasing.

entries.title: fix(security): validate --output-dir against path traversal (#30)
entries.rationale: Use the reported cases but implement centralized path containment with broader tests.

entries.title: feat(website): add Meta Performance Analyzer web app
entries.rationale: A website application is outside the v2 skill and CLI boundary.

entries.title: fix: update sub-skill count from 17 to 19 in SKILL.md
entries.rationale: The proposed count is already stale; generate counts from the capability/product manifest.

entries.title: fix(install): point REPO_URL at this repo + unmute clone errors
entries.rationale: Fix repository routing as part of the install redesign and preserve actionable errors.

entries.title: chore(deps): Bump actions/checkout from 6.0.2 to 6.0.3
entries.rationale: Superseded by the major-version proposal.

entries.title: fix: add SSRF bypass protection against urlparse/requests parser differential (closes #40)
entries.rationale: Port the regression intent into the centralized network/browser defense rather than merge a narrow patch.

entries.title: docs: add X/Twitter competitor signal guidance
entries.rationale: Use lawful organic signals as a confidence-labeled research input after current-source and policy review.

entries.title: Create performance-marketing.md for AI agent
entries.rationale: Integrate useful unit-economics concepts into typed finance and experiment contracts; do not add a duplicate standalone agent wholesale.

entries.title: chore(deps): Bump actions/checkout from 6.0.2 to 7.0.0
entries.rationale: Review after the v2 CI contract is stable and only merge with the full remote matrix.

entries.title: chore(deps): Bump actions/setup-python from 6.2.0 to 6.3.0
entries.rationale: Review after the v2 Python and CI matrix is stable.

entries.title: chore(deps): Update reportlab requirement from <5.0.0,>=4.0 to >=4.5.1,<5.0.0
entries.rationale: Review with report rendering and packaging after the v2 dependency model stabilizes.

entries.title: chore(deps): Update requests requirement from <3.0.0,>=2.32.4 to >=2.34.2,<3.0.0
entries.rationale: Review with network security regressions after the v2 dependency model stabilizes.

entries.title: chore(deps): Update urllib3 requirement from <3.0.0,>=2.6.3 to >=2.7.0,<3.0.0
entries.rationale: Review with requests compatibility and SSRF regressions after dependency redesign.

entries.title: chore(deps): Bump dependabot/fetch-metadata from 2.5.0 to 3.1.0
entries.rationale: Review after the v2 CI contract is stable.

entries.title: chore(deps): Update pillow requirement from <13.0.0,>=11.0.0 to >=12.2.0,<13.0.0
entries.rationale: Review with creative-generation fixtures after dependency redesign.

entries.title: chore(deps): Update matplotlib requirement from <4.0.0,>=3.8.0 to >=3.10.9,<4.0.0
entries.rationale: Review only if matplotlib remains a justified v2 dependency.

entries.title: chore(deps): Bump actions/checkout from 6.0.2 to 6.0.3
entries.rationale: Superseded by the major-version proposal.

entries.title: chore(deps): Bump actions/checkout from 6.0.2 to 7.0.0
entries.rationale: Review after the v2 CI contract is stable and only merge with the remote matrix.

entries.title: chore(deps): Bump actions/setup-python from 6.2.0 to 6.3.0
entries.rationale: Review after the v2 Python and CI matrix is stable.
